data.title: Helloworld Travel Updates Registered Head Office Address After Re-zoning
data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Helloworld Travel Ltd ( (AU:HLO) ).

Helloworld Travel Limited, a major travel distribution player in Australia and New Zealand, runs extensive leisure and corporate travel networks, broker operations, inbound destination management, air ticket consolidation, tourism transport and wholesale event packaging, underpinned by proprietary and third-party distribution systems. The company employs hundreds of staff across multiple countries and supports thousands of affiliated agencies and brokers in its core Australasian markets.

The company announced that its registered head office address has been re-zoned from South Melbourne VIC 3205 to Southbank VIC 3006, with the street address remaining 179-185 Normanby Road and all other details unchanged. The change is an administrative update to the official location designation and is not expected to affect Helloworld Travel’s operations, but ensures corporate records and stakeholder communications reflect the correct jurisdictional address.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:HLO) stock is a Buy with a A$2.90 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Helloworld Travel Ltd stock, see the AU:HLO Stock Forecast page.

More about Helloworld Travel Ltd

Helloworld Travel Limited is a leading Australian and New Zealand travel distribution company operating retail leisure and business travel networks, broker networks, inbound destination management, air ticket consolidation, tourism transport operations, wholesale travel services including event packaging, and online operations. The group employs over 900 personnel across Australia, New Zealand, Fiji and Greece, and supports more than 2,600 travel agency and broker network members in Australia and New Zealand, while also engaging in various philanthropic sponsorships.

Average Trading Volume: 241,082

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$275M

For an in-depth examination of HLO stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

The latest update is out from IRESS Limited ( (AU:IRE) ).

Iress Limited has disclosed a change in the interests of non-executive director Susan Margaret Forrester, who increased her indirect holding in the company through B & S Forrester Pty Ltd. On 5 March 2026, Forrester acquired 1,996 ordinary shares via an on-market trade at $7.43 per share, lifting her indirect stake from 11,540 to 13,536 ordinary shares.

The transaction reflects routine director dealing rather than a change in board composition or strategic direction, and no related contracts or derivatives were disclosed alongside the share purchase. While modest in scale, the additional investment marginally increases director alignment with shareholders, offering investors updated transparency on insider holdings in line with market disclosure requirements.

Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ) has issued an announcement.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited reported an estimated pre-tax net tangible asset backing of $2.522 per share as at 2 March 2026. This unaudited figure is calculated from the daily value of the company’s investment portfolio and cash, adjusted for management and performance fees, operating costs, and relevant tax movements.

data.description:
Claim 70% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Contel Technology Company Limited ( (HK:1912) ) has provided an update.

Contel Technology Company Limited issued a clarification regarding the shareholding of its controlling shareholder, P.Grand, following a previously implemented share consolidation. After consolidating 10 old shares into 1 new share in November 2025, P.Grand’s holding is restated as 66,274,600 shares, which still represents about 50.29% of the company’s issued share capital.

The company emphasized that this change is purely numerical and arises from the technical adjustment related to the share consolidation, with no alteration to P.Grand’s actual ownership stake or control level. All other information disclosed in earlier announcements about the charging of shares and a stop notice for transfer of certain shares remains unchanged, helping reassure investors about the continuity of the ownership structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:1912) stock is a Hold with a HK$0.60 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Contel Technology Company Limited stock, see the HK:1912 Stock Forecast page.

More about Contel Technology Company Limited

Contel Technology Company Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands and traded on the Main Board of the Stock Exchange of Hong Kong. The company operates under stock code 1912 and is governed by a board that includes executive and independent non-executive directors, reflecting standard corporate governance for a listed issuer.

Rox Resources Limited ( (AU:RXL) ) has provided an announcement.

Rox Resources Limited has confirmed the lapse of 1,000,000 options with an exercise price of $0.72 that expired on 4 March 2026 without being exercised or converted. The cessation of these options slightly simplifies the company’s capital structure by removing a tranche of potential future equity, which may marginally affect dilution expectations for existing shareholders.

The announcement is a routine disclosure under ASX requirements and does not in itself signal a change in the company’s underlying operations or strategy. However, the expiry of these options indicates that current market conditions or valuation did not support their exercise at the specified price, which may reflect how investors are presently assessing Rox Resources’ share price outlook.
